category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device compliance comparison for Uruguay market entry (URSEC / UNIT).

title.en: China-to-Uruguay Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (URSEC / UNIT)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入乌拉圭：合规差距矩阵（URSEC / UNIT）
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入烏拉圭：合規差距矩陣（URSEC / UNIT）

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Uruguayan URSEC mandatory homologación (type approval for radio and telecom terminal equipment under Ley 17.296 and URSEC resolutions), UNIT electrical safety and EMC standards (many harmonised with IEC/ISO and Mercosur NM standards), the authorized Uruguayan importer requirement (RUT/DGI registration), and the advisory cybersecurity framework under Ley 18.331 and Decreto 93/018. Uruguay uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type C/F/L plugs (primarily Type C). URSEC homologación is mandatory before import or sale; CCC is not recognised, though CE and FCC test reports may be accepted as a basis for the technical file. Spanish labelling is required.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与乌拉圭URSEC强制合规认证（依据Ley 17.296及URSEC决议对无线电及电信终端设备的型号认证）、UNIT电气安全和EMC标准（多数与IEC/ISO及Mercosur NM标准协调）、授权乌拉圭进口商要求（RUT/DGI注册），以及依据Ley 18.331和Decreto 93/018的网络安全建议框架的差距对照。乌拉圭采用220V/50Hz、C/F/L型插头（主要为C型）。进口或销售前须取得URSEC合规认证；CCC不被承认，但CE和FCC检测报告可作为技术文件的基础。须使用西班牙语标签。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與烏拉圭URSEC強制合規認證（依據Ley 17.296及URSEC決議對無線電及電信終端裝置的型號認證）、UNIT電氣安全和EMC標準（多數與IEC/ISO及Mercosur NM標準協調）、授權烏拉圭進口商要求（RUT/DGI註冊），以及依據Ley 18.331和Decreto 93/018的網路安全建議框架的差距對照。烏拉圭採用220V/50Hz、C/F/L型插頭（主要為C型）。進口或銷售前須取得URSEC合規認證；CCC不被承認，但CE和FCC檢測報告可作為技術文件的基礎。須使用西班牙語標籤。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, URSEC homologación, UNIT certification, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current URSEC resolutions, UNIT standards, Mercosur NM harmonisation status, electrical safety and EMC requirements, Uruguayan importer registration obligations, plug and voltage requirements, DGA (Uruguayan customs) requirements, and Spanish labelling rules with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or sale in Uruguay.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、URSEC合规认证、UNIT认证、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在向乌拉圭发货或销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行URSEC决议、UNIT标准、Mercosur NM协调状态、电气安全和EMC要求、乌拉圭进口商注册义务、插头和电压要求、DGA（乌拉圭海关）要求及西班牙语标签规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、URSEC合規認證、UNIT認證、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在向烏拉圭發貨或銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行URSEC決議、UNIT標準、Mercosur NM協調狀態、電氣安全和EMC要求、烏拉圭進口商註冊義務、插頭和電壓要求、DGA（烏拉圭海關）要求及西班牙語標籤規則。

answer_first.en: The main Uruguay compliance gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are: URSEC mandatory homologación under Ley 17.296 — all radio and telecom terminal equipment requires a URSEC certificate and URSEC mark/number on the label before import or sale, with no recognition of CCC or SRRC approvals (CE and FCC reports may be accepted as a basis for the technical file); an authorized Uruguayan importer with RUT/DGI registration is required; UNIT electrical safety and EMC compliance (standards harmonised with IEC/ISO and Mercosur NM); product compatibility with Uruguay's 220 V / 50 Hz power system and Type C/F/L plugs; and Spanish language labelling. Cybersecurity obligations are currently advisory under Ley 18.331 (personal data protection, AGESIC oversight) and Decreto 93/018 (national cybersecurity framework), but should be monitored as they evolve.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入乌拉圭的主要合规差距为：依据Ley 17.296的URSEC强制合规认证——所有无线电及电信终端设备在进口或销售前须取得URSEC证书并在标签上标注URSEC标志/编号，不认可CCC或SRRC核准（CE和FCC报告可作为技术文件基础）；须有持有RUT/DGI注册的授权乌拉圭进口商；UNIT电气安全和EMC合规（标准与IEC/ISO及Mercosur NM协调）；产品与乌拉圭220V/50Hz电源系统及C/F/L型插头的兼容性；以及西班牙语标签要求。网络安全义务目前在Ley 18.331（个人数据保护，AGESIC监管）和Decreto 93/018（国家网络安全框架）下为建议性要求，但应持续关注其发展动态。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入烏拉圭的主要合規差距為：依據Ley 17.296的URSEC強制合規認證——所有無線電及電信終端裝置在進口或銷售前須取得URSEC證書並在標籤上標注URSEC標誌/編號，不認可CCC或SRRC核准（CE和FCC報告可作為技術文件基礎）；須有持有RUT/DGI註冊的授權烏拉圭進口商；UNIT電氣安全和EMC合規（標準與IEC/ISO及Mercosur NM協調）；產品與烏拉圭220V/50Hz電源系統及C/F/L型插頭的相容性；以及西班牙語標籤要求。網路安全義務目前在Ley 18.331（個人資料保護，AGESIC監管）和Decreto 93/018（國家網路安全框架）下為建議性要求，但應持續關注其發展動態。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
